## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested on mobile (real phone or DevTools mobile mode at 375×667)
- [ ] If new game: registry entry + cover art added, game mount contract respected
- [ ] If touching a clone: title and art are copyright-safe
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude` / AI-attribution footers in commits or PR body
